## Problem Statement

A clear and concise description of what problem this feature would solve.
Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternative Solutions

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Impact

- [ ] This would require changes to the Crawlee API (TypeScript)
- [ ] This would require changes to Docker Compose / infrastructure
- [ ] This would require changes to the n8n workflow
- [ ] This would require documentation updates

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
